meta.phase-name: Model Tree Selection and Multi-Model Overlay

phase-summary.outcome: Model selection in controls now references the model tree workflow, Space Features is renamed to Features, and model tree supports checkbox multi-selection to overlay selected model spaces in the 3D viewer.

file.description: Added persistent selected-model-space IDs, tree checkboxes, and 3D overlay trace for selected model spaces.

tests.test: TypeScript typecheck passes after model-tree multi-select overlay integration.
